description: Dedicated 6-slide revenue pitch deck — the standard for all Flux Labs B2B proposals. Client-specific HTML slide deck, not a generic PDF.

design_system.card_style: money-card — glassmorphism rounded-3xl, stat-glow on big numbers
design_system.accent_usage: Highlight money words and industry outcome in text-accent-2 spans

slides.headline_pattern: TURN LOCAL SEARCH INTO MORE {OUTCOME_UNIT} AND MORE REVENUE
slides.tone: Bold, uppercase hero — immediate industry-specific outcome

pillars.title: Own more local demand
pillars.body_pattern: Buyers already search for {services}. Capture more before competitors.

pillars.title: Convert trust faster
pillars.body_pattern: Polished site + local profile = licensing, credibility, offers obvious in seconds.

pillars.title: Lift job value
pillars.body_pattern: Position around premium work so customers see value beyond price-shopping.

pillars.title: Track the real wins
pillars.body_pattern: Tie growth to actual calls, estimates, and signed jobs — ROI obvious.

slides.headline: What the upside could look like
slides.scenario_pattern: {extra_calls} additional qualified calls/mo × {close_rate}% close × ${avg_job_value} avg = visualized upside
slides.disclaimer: Illustrative scenario — not fantasy math. Clean way to visualize local gains.

slides.headline: What this could mean in real money

tiers.label: Conservative
tiers.copy: Even if only half lands, monthly potential still meaningful.

tiers.label: Base case
tiers.copy: At modeled close rate and avg job value, upside substantial fast.

tiers.label: Annualized
tiers.copy: Sustain a strong year — annual expansion opportunity massive.

deliverables.title: Conversion-first site
deliverables.body: Sharper CTAs, mobile, estimate routing, service page structure.

deliverables.title: Local SEO lift
deliverables.body: On-page targeting around {city} {industry} services and local intent.

deliverables.title: GBP optimization
deliverables.body: Categories, services, posts, photos, review flow for trust + visibility.

deliverables.title: Trust positioning
deliverables.body: License, professionalism, quality, offers where prospects see them.

deliverables.title: Lead capture system
deliverables.body: Click-to-call, simpler forms, tighter funnel — reduce lost leads.

deliverables.title: ROI tracking
deliverables.body: Line from marketing → calls → booked estimates → closed jobs.

slides.headline: Small spend. Big ceiling. Clear upside.
slides.body_pattern: Lean, fast, practical. Stronger lead engine first — scale after numbers prove out.
slides.thesis: Improve visibility → trust → conversion → turn local search into revenue.
slides.cta: Pair with Stripe checkout link + GHL Proposal Sent stage

integration.when_to_generate: Proposal Sent stage (deal-hunter pitch or manual pitch)
delivery: hosted HTML link in GHL notes
do_not: Send generic PDF without ROI math
Use light theme or corporate bland layout
